title: A1-Ma'mun's answer to Ibrahim b. 'Isa b. Burayhah's request to be admitted into the circle of the Caliph's travelling companions
description: A1-Ma'mun's answer to Ibrahim b. 'Isa b. Burayhah's request to be admitted into the circle of the Caliph's travelling companions. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
